description: The Asano-gumi is a yakuza group based in Okayama, Japan, formed in 1945 as the Oyama-ikka and restarted as the Asano-gumi in 1952. It has been involved in conflicts with the Yamaguchi-gumi and Kyodo-kai. Since 1996, it has been a member of the anti-Yamaguchi federation Gosha-kai. The group has approximately 40 members.
